fund_name: SBI Children's Fund Investment Plan Direct Growth
text:
Expense ratio is 0.84%. Exit load policy: With respect to units not subject to lock-in period and the holding period is less than
3 years: Exit load of 3% if redeemed within 1 year, 2% if redeemed after 1 year but within 2 year, 1% if redeemed after 2 year but within 3 year. Minimum SIP investment is ₹500. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹5000. Taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
